title: sedum gelidum
intro: Sedum gelidum, also known as the "Gelid Sedum" or "Ice Plant", is a succulent plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sedum gelidum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aiding in digestion. Sedum gelidum can be prepared in herbal form, often through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine, particularly in Asian cultures.
